10536942.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10536942.description: I didn't have sexual relations with that woman stated Bill Clinton, denying a sexual relationship with Monica Lewinsky. He was later impeached for his relationship with her.

10537390.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10537390.description: Jessica Hahn's rape allegation against televangelist conman Jim Bakker lead to the downfall of the Praise The Lord Network empire that was stealing millions from its followers.

10565902.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10565902.description: Rachel Uchitel's sex-affair of secret meetings and scandalous messages with Tiger Woods led her to become the face of Woods' career and marriage collapsing before the entire world.

10566851.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10566851.description: Former teacher Mary Kay Letourneau had a sexual relationship with a student. After years in prison they married and had children, as the world continues to scorn their relationship.

10543180.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10543180.description: Heidi Fleiss ran a prostitution ring in the 90's in LA. Her infamous red journal is known to reveal her many high-profile clients, including actors, musicians and politicians.

10544130.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10544130.description: Jennifer Wilbanks was the subject of a media circus when she faked her own kidnapping and claimed she was sexually abused. Wilbanks eventually revealed why she abandoned her fiancé 4 days before their wedding.

10566401.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10566401.description: TV personality Kim Kardashian builds a multi-million-dollar empire and becomes a pop culture phenomena, Kardashian's leaked sex tape thrusts her into the limelight, and her nude backside famously "broke" the internet in 2014.

10567335.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10567335.description: A teen from an affluent family drunkenly runs down a disabled SUV killing four people and injuring nine; the trial thrusts Ethan and his family into the spotlight when his lawyers claim he cannot serve jail time due to Affluenza.
